name: csoai.org — NIS2 FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions about NIS2 on csoai.org

acceptedAnswer.text: The Network and Information Security 2 Directive — EU cybersecurity regulation for essential and important entities.
Essential entities (energy, transport, health, water, digital) and important entities (postal, waste, manufacturing, food).
NIS2 must be transposed into national law by 17 October 2024. Enforcement started in 2025.
Article 21 measures: risk analysis, incident handling, business continuity, supply chain security, vulnerability disclosure.
